title: lablavia vulgaris
intro: Lablavia vulgaris, also known as English lavender, is a flowering plant in the mint family that is widely cultivated for its fragrant flowers and calming properties. The medicinal properties of English lavender include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. The health benefits of using English lavender include relief from anxiety and insomnia, improved sleep quality, and a reduction in stress levels. English lavender can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, teas, and dried flowers, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
